adds.rationale: Google's Willow chip announcement on Dec 9, 2024 is a sector-level inflection for quantum computing; adding D-Wave (annealing architecture) diversifies the quantum bucket alongside trapped-ion incumbent IONQ.

news_evidence.summary: Google announces Willow, the first quantum chip to achieve below-threshold error correction, completing an RCS benchmark in 5 minutes that would take supercomputers 10^25 years.
HPCwire reports Willow's error-correction breakthrough and roadmap details, sparking sector-wide rally in pure-play quantum names including QBTS.

adds.rationale: Palantir's Q3 2024 U.S. revenue grew 44% YoY on AIP demand and the company landed a 750M GBP UK defense agreement, fitting both the AI wave and the geopolitical/defense thesis with one ticker.

news_evidence.summary: Palantir Q3 2024: revenue +30% YoY, U.S. revenue +44% YoY to $499M, management cites 'unrelenting AI demand'.
Palantir secures large international defense contracts including a 750M GBP UK agreement, deepening AIP penetration in NATO defense.

removes.rationale: Cybersecurity ETF has corrected ~20% from its mid-November high and the user's wave thesis never named cybersecurity as a target wave; freeing the slot for higher-conviction thematic exposure.

news_evidence.summary: CIBR down 20% from mid-November high; analysts describe a 'long digestion period' of sideways consolidation.

removes.rationale: Symbotic disclosed it cannot file its 10-K on time (Nov 27, 2024), an accounting/governance flag that breaches the original clean-execution thesis; ISRG remains the robotics anchor.

news_evidence.summary: Symbotic announces it will be unable to file its 10-K by the SEC deadline, citing accounting review work.
Symbotic acquires OhmniLabs assets for $13M (Dec 3, 2024) and expands Walmart relationship into Mexico, but execution overhang from delayed 10-K dominates near-term thesis.

rationale_overall: Watchlist remains at the 24-ticker cap. Two adds lean into named wave-thesis themes (quantum diversification post-Willow announcement, AI/defense via PLTR) and two removes clear out a drifting cybersecurity ETF position and a robotics name with a fresh governance flag. Net thematic effect: quantum exposure broadens from 1 to 2 tickers, defense/AI deepens, cybersecurity exits, robotics consolidates to ISRG. Nuclear (4 tickers) stays at the wave-bucket ceiling; no further adds there.
